subject: ela
title: Summarizing a Passage
content: A summary gives the most important ideas in a shorter form. It should include the main idea and key details, but not every small example. A strong summary is clear, neutral, and written in your own words.

questions.hint: A summary keeps the important parts.

questions.prompt: Which should NOT be in a summary?
What does it mean to write a summary in your own words?
questions.hint: Do not just copy the passage.

questions.prompt: Which is the best first step before summarizing?
questions.hint: You need to understand before summarizing.
